validation_status_computation_logic.backend: bc_validation_service.py returns validation_status based on check outcomes: fail (required failures), warn (optional failures only), pass (all passed)
validation_status_computation_logic.frontend: DocumentDetailPage.js computes validation_status client-side from checks array if not provided by backend, ensuring backward compatibility with older documents
